metadata.title: Chevrolet & Car Events - Texas & Southwest States (Apr 2026 - Apr 2027)

events.name: Lonestar Rod & Kustom Round Up
events.description: 23rd annual outdoor car show and live music festival featuring vintage hot rods, custom cars, and kustoms. Admission $20, kids 12 and under free.

events.name: Pate Swap Meet
events.description: One of the largest automotive swap meets in the US. Free admission, $10 parking. Thousands of vendors selling parts, accessories, memorabilia.

events.name: Southwest Swap Meet (Spring)
events.description: Oldest continuously run classic car swap meet in Texas (est. 1968). 4,500+ vendor spaces, 150+ classic cars, 20,000 attendees.

events.name: Funny Car Chaos Classic
events.description: World's largest funny car event featuring nitro-burning cars. High-speed drag racing spectacle.

events.name: Mecum Houston Auction
events.description: 15th annual Mecum Houston. ~1,000 vehicles including five private collections. 40+ Corvettes consigned. Live on ESPN+.

events.name: Dallas Area Classic Chevys Tri-Five Show
events.description: Tri-Five Chevy Show celebrating the 50th Anniversary of DACC (Dallas Area Classic Chevys). 1955-57 Chevy focused.

events.name: C10 Nationals - Texas
events.description: GM C10 truck show with Show-N-Shine, autocross, dyno challenge, drag racing, vendors, swap meet, and car corral. Spectator $25/day.

events.name: Holley LS Fest Texas
events.description: Celebration of GM LS and LT engines. Drifting, drag racing, burnout wars, car show, truck shootout. All LS/LT-powered vehicles welcome.

events.name: Lone Star Corvette Classic
events.description: Major multi-day Corvette show and gathering with judging competitions, vendors, awards, and entertainment.

events.name: Jerry's Chevrolet Memorial Day Classic Car Show
events.description: Annual Memorial Day classic car show hosted by a Chevy dealership.

events.name: Corvette Invasion
events.description: Annual Corvette-focused show and gathering in the Hill Country.

events.name: C10s in the Park
events.description: 11th annual show. 1,200+ GM classic trucks gather. Free spectator admission. One of the largest C10 gatherings in the country.

events.name: Goodguys 33rd Summit Racing Lone Star Nationals
events.description: New two-day format. Hot rods, muscle cars, customs, trucks (1999 and older). AutoCross, swap meet, vendors, live music.

events.name: Texas Auto Show at State Fair of Texas
events.description: 24-day auto show combined with the country's largest state fair. All major manufacturers represented.

events.name: Mecum Dallas Auction
events.description: Major collector car auction with hundreds of vehicles crossing the block.

events.name: NHRA 41st Texas Fall Nationals / Stampede of Speed
events.description: NHRA national event plus week-long Stampede of Speed festival. Professional drag racing at its finest.

events.name: Southwest Swap Meet (Fall)
events.description: Fall edition of the oldest classic car swap meet in Texas.

events.name: Lowrider Super Show San Antonio
events.description: Celebration of Chicano and lowrider culture. Custom lowriders, classic cars, and builds from across Texas. Many Chevy Impalas featured. 11am-6pm.

events.name: Goodguys 16th LMC Truck Spring Lone Star Nationals
events.description: 2,000+ hot rods, muscle cars, customs, trick trucks (1999 and older). AutoCross, swap meet, vendors. Season opener for Goodguys.

events.name: 48th Corvette Chevy Expo

location.venue: Galveston Island Convention Center at The San Luis Resort

events.description: 48th annual Corvette and Chevy expo. Show cars, specialty vendors, swap meet, plus Galveston Craft Show. All under one roof.

events.name: TX2K26
events.description: The 'Super Bowl of Street Car Racing.' 600+ street cars compete in drag racing and roll racing over 6 days. Entry $399/car. 150+ vendors. Many LS-powered builds.

events.name: Houston Art Car Parade & Festival
events.description: Multi-day art car festival and parade featuring wildly customized vehicles.

events.name: Arizona Lowrider Super Show
events.description: Largest lowrider car show and concert in the nation. Hundreds of indoor and outdoor vehicles. Chicano music, food, fashion & cars. 11am-6pm.

events.name: Barrett-Jackson Scottsdale Auction (Arizona Car Week)
events.description: World's greatest collector car auction. Part of Arizona Car Week (Jan 16-25) with 30+ events across the Valley. Rock the Block concert Jan 16.

events.name: Arizona Car Week 2026
events.description: Nine-day series with 30+ events including Arizona Concours d'Elegance, Barrett-Jackson, Bonhams auction. Classic, collector, and exotic cars.

events.name: Scottsdale Ranch Exotic Car Show
events.description: Free exotic and classic car show. 11am-3pm.

events.name: 20th Annual Prescott Corvette Show
events.description: 20th annual Corvette-only show in the cool pines of Prescott.

events.name: Goodguys 29th Speedway Motors Southwest Nationals
events.description: Season finale for Goodguys 43rd season. Hot rods, customs, muscle cars (1999 and older). AutoCross, swap meet, Nitro Thunderfest.

events.name: FuelFest Arizona
events.description: Part of FuelFest world tour. Massive car show and festival experience.

events.name: LowClass NM Car Show

location.venue: Expo New Mexico - Manuel Lujan Jr Exhibit Complex

events.description: Lowrider and custom car show at Expo New Mexico.

events.name: New Mexico Motorfest
events.description: All-makes show: lifted trucks, imports, classics, tuners, hot rods, customs, motorcycles, lowriders, SEMA builds. DJs, contests, vendors. 12-5pm.

events.name: 10th Annual Honor Flight Car Show
events.description: Charity car show benefiting Honor Flight. Open to all makes. 9am start.

events.name: Red River Classic Car Show
events.description: 150+ vehicles from classics and hot rods to modern marvels. Live music, food vendors. Mountain setting at 8,750 ft elevation.

events.name: Albuquerque Lowrider Super Show
events.description: Major lowrider super show. Heavily features Chevy Impalas, Monte Carlos, and other GM platforms. GoLo Entertainment production.

events.name: Colorado Auto Show
events.description: 22 manufacturers including Chevrolet. Test drives, exotic cars, Batmobile, DeLorean, F1 simulator. Tickets $16, kids 16 and under free.

events.name: Goodguys 27th Griot's Garage Colorado Nationals
events.description: 1999 and older hot rods, muscle cars, customs, pro-touring. AutoCross, swap meet, 80+ awards, Family Fun Zone. Western States Shootout Saturday.

events.name: C10 Nationals - Las Vegas
events.description: GM C10 truck show with Show-N-Shine, autocross, dyno challenge, vendors, swap meet, car corral. Spectator $25/day, 12 and under free.

events.name: Viva Las Vegas Rockabilly Weekend
events.description: Massive rockabilly festival with vintage car show featuring 1960s and older hot rods, customs, and classics.

events.name: Barrett-Jackson Las Vegas Auction
events.description: Highly anticipated return of Barrett-Jackson to Las Vegas. Collector car auction with hundreds of vehicles.

events.name: Las Vegas Concours d'Elegance
events.description: Upscale concours event at the Wynn featuring rare and significant automobiles.

events.name: SEMA Show 2026
events.description: World's premier automotive specialty products trade event. 2,400 exhibitors, 140,000+ attendees, 70,000+ buyers. Trade-only (public day Nov 6). Major Chevy aftermarket presence.

events.name: 51st Annual Salt Lake City Autorama
events.description: America's finest hot rods, custom cars, trucks, and motorcycles. 51st annual edition.

sources.name: Car Show Radar
sources.description: Comprehensive car show listings updated regularly. Filter by state, date, type.

sources.name: CarCruiseFinder
sources.description: Car shows, cruise nights, and automotive events. State-by-state listings.

sources.name: MotorTexas
sources.description: Texas-specific auto shows, car events, and meets. Tag filtering (Corvette, truck, etc.).

sources.name: OldRide Events
sources.description: Classic car shows, swap meets, rallies. Searchable by state.

sources.name: Goodguys Rod & Custom
sources.coverage: National circuit (TX, AZ, CO in Southwest)
sources.description: Major hot rod/custom car show series. 3 Southwest events per year (Spring Lone Star, Lone Star Nationals, Southwest Nationals, Colorado Nationals).

sources.name: Nevada Car Culture
sources.description: Comprehensive Nevada car event calendar updated monthly.

sources.name: Arizona Car Culture
sources.description: Arizona car shows, meets, and cruise-ins calendar.

sources.name: Utah Car Culture
sources.description: Utah car shows, cruise nights, and charity events.

sources.name: New Mexico Car Council (NMCCC)
sources.description: New Mexico Car Council upcoming events and club listings.

sources.name: Lowrider Experience / GoLo Entertainment
sources.description: Official Lowrider magazine super show schedule. 9 events nationally in 2026.

sources.name: Hill Country Portal - Car Shows
sources.description: Car shows, swap meets, and rallies in the TX Hill Country region.

sources.name: Autofests
sources.description: Car show and automotive event listings with detailed event pages.

sources.name: Dallas Area Classic Chevys (DACC)
sources.description: Chevy-specific club with calendar of local Chevy shows and cruises.

sources.name: Texas Corvette Association
sources.description: Corvette-specific events, shows, and club gatherings across Texas.

sources.name: Vette Vues Corvette Calendar
sources.description: Extensive list of Corvette events nationwide. Good for finding regional Corvette shows.

sources.name: LMC Truck Events
sources.description: Classic truck show and event schedule. LMC sponsors many Goodguys and truck-specific events.

sources.name: Time Machine Car Shows
sources.description: Texas car show calendar and event organizer.
